chapter_title: Obedience to and Effect of Traffic Laws
text:
(a) A person shall not sell a class 3 electric bicycle to a person under 16 years of age.

(b) A violation of this section is an infraction and shall be punishable by a fine not to exceed two hundred and fifty dollars ($250).
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 11. RULES OF THE ROAD [21000 - 23336]
### Chapter 1. Obedience to and Effect of Traffic Laws [21000 - 21300]
#### Article 4. Operation of Bicycles [21200 - 21214.7]
##### § 21212.5

(a) A person shall not sell a class 3 electric bicycle to a person under 16 years of age.

(b) A violation of this section is an infraction and shall be punishable by a fine not to exceed two hundred and fifty dollars ($250).

*(Added by Stats. 2025, Ch. 65, Sec. 1. (AB 965) Effective January 1, 2026.)*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A person shall not sell a class 3 electric bicycle to a person under 16 years of age.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: A violation of this section is an infraction and shall be punishable by a fine not to exceed two hundred and fifty dollars ($250).
